query: SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.pdfUrl') as pdfUrl, JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.laudoUrl') as laudoUrl, JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.s3Url') as s3Url, JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.arquivoUrl') as arquivoUrl FROM ultrassons WHERE gestanteId = 330076 ORDER BY dataExame;
